handoff_brief:
  recipient: Shaq
  task_context: >
    Implement the notification preferences API for the "notification preferences"
    feature. Users can opt out of marketing emails but cannot opt out of
    transactional emails — this is a legal requirement, not a product choice.
    Bird submitted two versions; v2 supersedes v1 entirely. v2 removed the
    transactional opt-out acceptance criterion and replaced it with an explicit
    prohibition enforced at the API layer.
